title: sida torreyi
intro: Sida torreyi, also known as Torrey's mallow or Torrey's sida, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sida torreyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and support the immune system. Sida torreyi is traditionally prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or salve, and can also be used to make teas and tinctures.
